summary: Frontend testing of SAAKSHYAM AI Phase 1 upgrade - Dashboard, Legal Intelligence Engine, Smart Summons, Jurisdiction Finder, and Case Diary modules tested. All major features working except Jurisdiction Finder has runtime error.

ui_bugs.issue: Still shows old branding 'NYAYA PRAHARI' instead of 'SAAKSHYAM AI'
Runtime JavaScript errors appearing on page load and map interactions - 'Script error' at handleError

passed_tests: Dashboard shows 'SAAKSHYAM AI' branding and 'INVESTIGATION COMMAND CONSOLE' subtitle
Dashboard displays 9 module cards in grid layout
Sidebar shows all 10 menu items (Dashboard + 9 modules)
3 new modules (Smart Summons, Jurisdiction Finder, Case Diary) show NEW badges in sidebar
Legal Intelligence Engine loads with 3 tabs (BNS, BNSS, BSA)
Legal Intelligence text analysis finds relevant BNS sections with keyword matching
Legal Intelligence shows old law equivalents (IPC/CrPC/Evidence Act)
Tab switching works in Legal Intelligence Engine
Smart Summons Tracker page loads with dropzone and form
Smart Summons form submission works - summons added to tracker list
Smart Summons shows status dropdown (Pending, Attended, Missed, Rescheduled)
Case Diary page loads with audio dropzone
Case Diary shows SHA-256 integrity hash notice
Case Diary form fields present (case number, date, location, description, notes)
Jurisdiction Finder map loads (OpenStreetMap tiles visible)
Jurisdiction Finder search input and button present
failed_tests: Jurisdiction Finder - map click/search not showing station details due to JavaScript errors
action_items: Update Login.js to show 'SAAKSHYAM AI' instead of 'NYAYA PRAHARI' (line 67)
Fix Jurisdiction Finder JavaScript runtime errors - likely related to handleMapClick function closure issue in useEffect dependency array
critical_code_review_comments: JurisdictionFinder.js line 135: useEffect has empty dependency array but uses handleMapClick which captures state via closures. Consider using useCallback or moving handleMapClick inside useEffect.
Login.js still has old branding - needs update to match new 'SAAKSHYAM AI' theme
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jurisdiction Finder has JavaScript runtime errors preventing map interactions from working. The map loads but clicking doesn't show station details. Other new modules (Smart Summons, Case Diary) work correctly. Login page branding needs to be updated to SAAKSHYAM AI.

mocked_apis.note: Google Translation, Speech-to-Text, and NLP APIs are MOCKED - configured but not integrated into frontend processing pipeline
